rows.label: qev086110_MSG0001
rows.name: SO DELICIOUS![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086110_MSG0002
rows.name: Everything taste amazing![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086110_MSG0003
rows.name: I'm really glad you like it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086110_MSG0004
rows.name:
Tatsu experienced minor
misunderstanding.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086110_MSG0005
rows.name:
Tatsu thought Lin-san wanted
to turn him into pie.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086110_MSG0006
rows.name: Sorry I scared you, buddy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086110_MSG0007
rows.name: But...then why feast?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086110_MSG0008
rows.name: You turned 13 the other day, didn't you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086110_MSG0009
rows.name: Yes! Tatsu now full-grown Nopon![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086110_MSG0010
rows.name:
Well, we've been so busy
around here, we never got to
throw you a birthday party.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086110_MSG0011
rows.name: Friends have party on birthing day?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086110_MSG0012
rows.name:
It's an old Earth custom. It's a
way to celebrate the moment your
family gets a little bigger.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086110_MSG0013
rows.name:
I was always so happy when people
celebrated mine, so I figured...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086110_MSG0014
rows.name: L...Lin-san...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086110_JNK0010
rows.name: Congratulate

rows.label: qev086110_SEL0011
rows.name: Wish Tatsu a happy birthday.

rows.label: qev086110_JNK0020
rows.name: Encourage

rows.label: qev086110_SEL0021
rows.name: Tell Tatsu to eat as much as he likes.

rows.label: qev086110_MSG0015
rows.name: Friends make Tatsu so happy![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086110_MSG0016
rows.name: Oh, thank you! Tatsu still going strong![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086110_MSG0017
rows.name:
But Tatsu not want to hog it all.
Friends must join in feast too![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086110_MSG0018
rows.name:
That's how birthday parties
are supposed to work.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086110_MSG0019
rows.name:
Does this make Tatsu
part of Lin-san family?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086110_MSG0020
rows.name: You bet it does![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086110_MSG0021
rows.name:
Yes! Mamapon will be relieved
Tatsu finally have wifeypon![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086110_MSG0021_2
rows.name: Tatsu do dance of matrimony![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086110_MSG0022
rows.name:
...WIFE?! Uh no, no we've got
another misunderstanding here...[ST:wait ]
